mainEntity.name: How long does it take to rank a Houston law firm in Google AI Overviews?
mainEntity.text: How long does it take to rank a Houston law firm in Google AI Overviews?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically 3-6 months for Houston firms with comprehensive GEO audits, schema implementation, and fresh local content. Faster (1-3 months) for competitive practices like oil/gas law with high citability.

suggestedAnswer.text: Timeline varies by site health; start with diagnostic review, then deploy structured data and Houston-specific FAQs. Track progress via AI tools like Perplexity. Maintain with bi-weekly updates; delays common in saturated markets without authority backlinks.

name: Timeline for Houston Law Firm AI Overview Rankings
